title: pityrogramma calomelanos var. chrysophylla
intro: Pityrogramma calomelanos var. chrysophylla is a species of fern commonly known as the golden hay-scented fern or golden lip fern, named for its distinctive yellow-green coloration and the sweet scent of its fronds. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Pityrogramma calomelanos var. chrysophylla has been reported to possess medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Pityrogramma calomelanos var. chrysophylla are thought to include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Pityrogramma calomelanos var. chrysophylla is typically prepared for consumption as a tea or tincture, with the dried fronds steeped in hot water to release their active compounds.
